_A_TABLE_FORM_DND_DESCRIPTION_: The example shows accessible row reordering using drag-and-drop and move up and down buttons.
_A_TABLE_FORM_EDIT_DESCRIPTION_: The example shows row editing, adding a new row, and deleting rows with confirmation.
_A_TABLE_FORM_STICKY_DESCRIPTION_: The example shows a wide table with a sticky actions column on the right.
